message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.
coreIssue: The user is experiencing a 403 error when trying to log in to their ArcVault account
summary: The user is unable to log in to their ArcVault account due to a 403 error, which started after the update last Tuesday. The user's account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This issue is blocking their access to the platform.

message: We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy organization and this would save us hours every month.
coreIssue: The customer is requesting a bulk export feature for audit logs to improve compliance efficiency.
summary: The customer is seeking a bulk export feature for audit logs to reduce manual effort and improve compliance. They currently spend hours every month on this task. This is a feature request to improve their workflow efficiency.

message: Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1240 but our contract rate is $980/month. Can someone look into this?
coreIssue: The customer is being charged a higher rate than their contract rate.
summary: The customer is disputing a charge on their invoice, claiming it exceeds their contract rate of $980/month. The invoice in question is #8821 with a charge of $1240. The customer is requesting someone to look into this issue.

message: I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.
coreIssue: The customer is inquiring about setting up SSO with Okta as their auth provider.
summary: The customer is evaluating switching their auth provider and wants to know if it's possible to set up SSO with Okta. They are seeking information on this integration. The customer is not reporting any current issues, but rather planning for a potential switch.

message: Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm. Checked our end, it's definitely on your side. Multiple users affected.
coreIssue: The ArcVault dashboard stopped loading for multiple users
summary: The ArcVault dashboard stopped loading around 2pm for multiple users, and the issue has been confirmed to be on ArcVault's side. The users have already checked their end and confirmed the issue is not local. This is a high-priority incident requiring immediate attention.
